summary: FREE11 Engagement & Retention Systems - All 13 features tested successfully. 20/20 backend tests pass. Frontend navigation and UI verified. All engagement APIs under /api/v2/engage/* working correctly.

TIERS.returns: 5 tiers: Bronze(0), Silver(500), Gold(2000), Platinum(5000), Diamond(15000) + XP rules

MISSIONS.returns: 5 daily missions with progress tracking, reward_coins, reward_xp, claimed status

MISSION_CLAIM.returns: Validates mission_id, returns 400 for invalid/incomplete missions

SPIN.returns: 400 for duplicate spin (admin already spun today)

LEADERBOARD_DAILY.returns: Ranked users with total_coins, tier, rewards

STORE_TIERS.returns: 5 store levels: Bronze-Diamond with unlock status based on player tier

SURPRISE_REWARDS.returns: Rewards for triggers like first_win (100% chance), returns null for invalid triggers

existing_features_verified.match_centre: Working - EntitySport real API (SA vs NZ, IND vs ENG matches)
existing_features_verified.predict_page: Working - prediction types, coming up matches
existing_features_verified.earn_page: Working - Fantasy Contests, Match Winner Predictions, Over Outcome
existing_features_verified.games_page: Working - Rummy, Teen Patti, Poker rooms
existing_features_verified.profile_page: Working - User info, balance 100530 coins, stats, actions
